📰 Three of her four wins have come over 7f/1m here, but she stays well as she showed when scoring at Wolverhampton (1m4f, Tapeta) in February; may have been unlucky not to win when beaten a short head at Chelmsford (13.3f, Polytrack) 13 days ago and one for the shortlist.
🧠 Model's top pick. Modest ratings for this level; going conditions are ideal; good course record; market price confirms model confidence.
2 Dotties Star ↓ 9 Sea The Moon / Desert Sun 0.8 8-10 (-13) Sean D Bowen Pat Phelan 77 54 52/7-1 54.6 14.5% 6.9 8.2 9.00 +1.1pp
📰 Better known as a hurdler these days, but he made a successful return to the Flat when narrowly landing a 0-50 classified event at Lingfield (1m4f, Polytrack) a fortnight ago; this will be harder, but he remains unexposed on the AW.
🧠 Main danger. Modest ratings for this level; on an improving trajectory; well-handicapped at the weights; good course record, in-form trainer (Pat Phelan); drifting in the market (6/1 → 9/1, 50% longer).
3 Uzincso 3 Mayson / Nayef ▲ 2.0 9-5 (-4) David Egan John Butler 77 71 41974- 51.9 10.5% 9.5 8.2 7.00 -2.1pp
📰 Veteran who has nothing to prove on this track having won seven times over 1m/1m3f here; can go well fresh so the four-month absence shouldn't be a problem, but the trip remains a moot point.
🧠 In contention. Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form; pedigree suits this trip and ground (Mayson); good course record, in-form trainer (John Butler).
4 Maywedance 4 Mehmas / Fastnet Rock 4.3 9-0 (-9) William Carson John O'Shea 78 65 9-4574 49.7 8.1% 12.3 13.2 21.00 +2.8pp
📰 Ordinary form of late, but is 1lb lower than when dead-heating over C&D in November on her final start for Alice Haynes; possibilities if bouncing back.
🧠 In contention. Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; going conditions are ideal; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
5 Pablo Prince 2 Outstrip / Elnadim 2.6 8-8 (-15) Luke Morris Karen Jewell 75 55 82-624 49.5 8.0% 12.6 13.2 10.00 -2.4pp
📰 Has gone close a couple of times in recent outings, but has only managed to win one of his last 28 starts; likely to find one or two too good.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; on an improving trajectory; breeding is a positive (Outstrip), well-handicapped at the weights; good course record, in-form trainer (Karen Jewell).
6 Upepo 13 Roaring Lion / Clodovil 1.1 9-5 (-4) Myla Coppins(7) Tony Carroll 76 55 18-034 47.5 6.2% 16.1 13.2 11.00 -1.5pp
📰 Not the most consistent, but has won six times on the AW including five over 1m4f/1m5f at Lingfield; has run well here, but stall 13 isn't ideal even over this trip.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on an improving trajectory; breeding is a positive (Roaring Lion); top jockey booked.
7 Fravanco 7 Proconsul / Captain Rio 0.7 8-13 (-10) Robert Havlin Michael Madgwick 74 61 3522-4 46.4 5.5% 18.3 13.2 8.00 -4.9pp
📰 Mainly seen over hurdles lately and is just 2-33 under rules, but one of his wins came over C&D and his last few efforts on the AW off similar marks would give him an each-way chance here.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; good course record, in-form trainer (Michael Madgwick), top jockey booked.
8 Pershalla 11 Persian King / Frankel 0.3 9-6 (-3) Kieran Shoemark Amanda Perrett 75 15 44/3-0 46.3 5.4% 18.6 13.2 23.00 +3.2pp
📰 0-5; made the frame in all three starts at Lingfield (1m/1m2f), but having been off for 11 months she failed to beat a rival on handicap debut over 1m3f here five weeks ago; hood will need to make a difference.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; good course record, in-form trainer (Amanda Perrett); market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
9 Fiddlers Green 6 Awtaad / Bahri ▲ 1.7 9-3 (-6) Gina Mangan John O'Shea 79 65 2-2856 45.9 5.1% 19.5 13.2 15.00 +0.9pp
📰 May have done too much early and might have failed for stamina when sixth of eight at Chelmsford (13.3f. Polytrack) 13 days ago (Take The Boat second); better judged on his previous form around here including wins over 1m3f/1m4f; respected for stable that also runs Maywedance.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; breeding is a positive (Awtaad); good course record.
10 It's A Love Thing 8 Intrinsic / Kyllachy 3.0 9-4 (-5) James Doyle Sam England 71 56 8-6780 44.4 4.3% 23.3 22.9 12.00 -4.0pp
📰 Seven wins on the AW including one over 1m3f here; continues to slide down the weights, but recent efforts need improving on including when last of ten at Wolverhampton (9.5f, Tapeta) on Monday.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve, fit and race-ready; breeding is a positive (Intrinsic), going conditions are ideal; top jockey booked.
11 Iwantmytimewithyou 1 Time Test / Dalakhani 0.5 9-9 Billy Loughnane Ed Dunlop 78 - 11557- 43.6 3.9% 25.4 22.9 9.00 -6.7pp
📰 Gained back-to-back successes at Ripon (1m4f, good) and Bath (1m6f, firm) last July, the latter courtesy of the stewards; lost his form aftewards and has something to prove on his Polytrack debut after seven months off.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; top jockey booked.
12 Mrembo 5 Albaasil / Tobougg ▲ 1.6 9-3 (-6) Joe Leavy Jonathan Portman 75 27 63063- 41.8 3.1% 31.7 22.9 10.00 -5.6pp
📰 Five-time winner over 1m2f-11.7f on turf, but out of the frame in three goes on the AW; not seen in six months and has no great record fresh.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form; breeding is a positive (Albaasil), going may not suit; good course record.
13 Dubai Immo 12 The Gurkha / Exceed And Excel 0.6 8-4 (-19) Rose Dawes(5) Paddy Butler 74 56 8705-8 41.2 3.0% 33.8 22.9 19.00 -0.9pp
📰 3-41; 7lb lower than when making a successful reappearance at Chelmsford (1m2f, Polytrack) around this time last year and he has offered a little bit of encouragement in his last couple of outings; off 11 weeks, but could go well at a price.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form; going may not suit, well-handicapped at the weights; good course record, in-form trainer (Paddy Butler), top jockey booked; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two classified events over 5f on turf in 2024; she finished a close second in the corresponding race 12 months ago (after an identical 204-day absence) but that was her only bright spot last year; 7lb lower this time around and she can't be discounted."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has run well over C&D, including when a close third in this race 12 months ago, but the track doesn't always lend itself to his hold-up style; drawn widest and could prove vulnerable, for all he is attractively weighted."

      }

        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Justified strong market support on his 5f Newcastle handicap debut in January; finished behind the reopposing Liverpool Star at Southwell next time but resumed his progression when landing another 5f Newcastle handicap last month; edged out a next-time-out winner on that occasion so should still be feasibly treated after a 2lb nudge."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Brave Traveller",

        "fair_odds": "6.56",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Edged out Liverpool Star to win a 6f Newcastle handicap in December; faded into fifth on his reappearance there in March but is entitled to strip fitter for the outing; showed promise on turf at the start of his career; respected."
      },

        "rank": 3,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Could only manage fourth of eight on her 5f Redcar handicap debut (good) in October but the fact she went off the 13-8 favourite suggests better was anticipated; remains unexposed and it'll be interesting to see if there's money for her again back from six months off."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "On the back of quite promising efforts on her first three starts she was backed into 2-1 favouritism for her Carlisle handicap debut in September but finished last of nine and was subsequently found to have bled; off since; it'll be interesting to see whether her supporters are prepared to give her another chance."

      },

        "rank": 9,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has finished seventh in sprint handicaps at Naas and Dundalk; not beaten far in each case, but clearly needs to find a bit extra; cheekpieces for the first time."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel colt out of a Group 2 winner; promise when placed over 6f at Doncaster (good) and 7f at Redcar (good to soft) last year; shaped particularly well at the latter venue given he lost plenty of ground at the start when his blindfold appeared to get stuck; definitely more to come."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Jeddaal",

        "fair_odds": "7.22",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-25.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fair form at around 7f on going ranging from good to firm to good to soft last year; below par when turned over at short odds over 6f on soft final start; reappears having been gelded; sure to be thereabouts if recapturing anywhere near the best of his 2yo form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "spotlight": "Half-sister to winners Belacqua (7f/1m AW 2yo; RPR 90), Notimeforchitchat (7f/1m AW; 86) and Sullivan Bay (13.3f/2m AW; 65); dam 7f AW winner only start; from a respected yard and would enter calculations if the betting speaks in her favour."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Left debut effort behind to finish second at Leicester (7f, good) last September; respectable fifth in another 7f novice at Redcar (good to soft) later in the autumn; gelded ahead of reappearance; ought to be thereabouts."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise in defeat on all four 7f starts last year; the form of his penultimate third in a soft-ground novice at Ayr has worked out really well and he's capable of winning races in 2026."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The starts have been an issue for her but she finally got her act together when winning a 5f handicap at Chelmsford in February; followed up at Wolverhampton soon afterwards but she blew the start in her hat-trick bid at Chelmsford five days later; has a bit more to prove on turf but she can't be discounted."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

  {
    "course": "Gowran Park",
    "time": "15:15",
    "race_name": "Irish Stallion Farms EBF Fillies Maiden",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Soft",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Wedding",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Myboycharlie",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "19.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.05",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-15.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "E350,000 yearling; fourth foal; No Nay Never filly is a sister to winners Broadhurst (7f-1m2f RPR 112) and Love Comedy (Japanese 6f turf 2yo/7f dirt); dam French/US 1m-10.5f winner (inc Listed; 100); of obvious interest, even though she holds no big-race entries."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sinmara",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "36",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "18.0%",
        "fair_odds": "5.56",
        "best_dec": "2.25",
        "edge": "-25.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kingman filly; 400,000gns yearling; closely related to 7f AW 2yo winner Spinto Soprano, half-sister to 1m AW winner/St Leger runner-up Rahiebb; always in touch when a promising third behind two Aidan O'Brien-trained fillies in a 7f maiden on soft-to-heavy at the Curragh on only start at two."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Rayzera",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "55-",
        "sire": "Gleneagles",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "16.1%",
        "fair_odds": "6.22",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked in need of further when 9l fifth of ten over 7f here last September; appreciated the extra furlong when 5l fifth of 16 over this trip at Cork later that month; open to improvement; might come into his own over a bit further than this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Croi Gra",
        "jockey": "Leigh Roche",
        "trainer": "Miss Natalia Lupini",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Alkumait",
        "dam_sire": "Alhaarth",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "14.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.08",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Alkumait half-sister to four winners including Holiday Magic (ten wins, all on AW), Coolnagree (two 7f wins, Group 3-placed) and Blackhall (point/4m Maryland Hunt Cup); dam placed 2m hurdle, half-sister to HK/Singapore 6f Group 1 winner Lucky Nine; hooded for debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Retro Gal",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "Henry De Bromhead",
        "ts": "20",
        "rpr": "57",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "77-",
        "sire": "Palace Pier",
        "dam_sire": "Nathaniel",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "38.4",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.54",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two modest efforts at two after running in a barrier trial; started slowly when well beaten over C&D on debut at this venue; again started slowly when failing to improve in a 1m Dundalk maiden."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Remember That",
        "jockey": "Seamie Heffernan",
        "trainer": "Joseph G Murphy",
        "ts": "39",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "87-",
        "sire": "Calyx",
        "dam_sire": "Stravinsky",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "36.2",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.69",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Calyx filly is half-sister to seven winners, notably the top-class Rip Van Winkle; ran green, never counted on debut in a 7f Naas fillies' maiden last August; raced keenly and dropped away in the last furlong of a similar race at Galway; has plenty to prove."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Valentina's Grace",
        "jockey": "Nicola Burns(5)",
        "trainer": "Ciaran Murphy",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "9-",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "33.4",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.39",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Slowly away and always behind on only Dundalk start; has changed stable; best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Poet's Willow",
        "jockey": "Mel Sheridan(10)",
        "trainer": "Fergal Birrane",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "17",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "00",
        "sire": "Poet's Word",
        "dam_sire": "Winged Love",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "30.6",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.32",
        "best_dec": "251.00",
        "edge": "+7.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No sign of ability in two runs at Dundalk; can be left out of calculations."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Catterick",
    "time": "15:23",
    "race_name": "Bet At Racing TV Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Farandaway",
        "jockey": "Oliver Stammers",
        "trainer": "Grant Tuer",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "-44321",
        "sire": "Far Above",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "56.8",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.37",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-10.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Running well in defeat in 5f/6f handicaps on AW prior to getting off the mark at the 17th attempt in Newcastle maiden (6f, AW) three weeks ago; positive performances on all three previous visits here; untested at 7f but it's possible the trip will be within range; in the mix if seeing it out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Evocative Spark",
        "jockey": "Ethan Tindall(5)",
        "trainer": "John David Riches",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "7167-9",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "9.6%",
        "fair_odds": "10.44",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Down the field at Southwell (1m, AW) in February on sole run this year but he's just 1-22 on AW as opposed to 5-31 on turf; won in good style over C&D (soft) last October and, while slow ground would boost confidence in his claims, he may be okay on good going; on the shortlist now back here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Precious Spartan",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Patrick Neville",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "14973-",
        "sire": "Magna Grecia",
        "dam_sire": "Tobougg",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.57",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive after joining this yard last May, winning three times at Ripon (1m, good) and posting a close third at Ayr (1m, soft) in September when last seen; the drop back to 7f might not be ideal on his reappearance but he's one to consider nevertheless."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Yafaarr",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "23123-",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive City",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.68",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In fine form for new yard last autumn, predominantly on AW but also when close third at Redcar (7f, good); he can play a leading role if continuing the good work on this return to action."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Crocodile Power",
        "jockey": "Dale Swift",
        "trainer": "Seb Spencer",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "05183-",
        "sire": "Slade Power",
        "dam_sire": "Trans Island",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.76",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His last four wins have come over 6f here; can't be ruled out given his record here and one of those wins came on good ground, but soft going appears to bring out the best in him and 6f looks to be his optimum trip; races for the first-time since December."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Wadacre Maestro",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "61065-",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Primo Valentino",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "47.9",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.80",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent last year but won at Musselburgh (7f, good) in August on his third handicap start and wasn't beaten far in fifth at Wolverhampton (7f, AW) when last seen; remains lightly raced and could be a contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Way To Dubai",
        "jockey": "Kevin Stott",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "373538",
        "sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "dam_sire": "Harbour Watch",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.8",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.89",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He's won just once since making his British debut in October 2023; however, that came this January (7f, AW) and a slow start proved costly when back at 6f at Southwell last Thursday; effective on turf and might not be far away now back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Vince Le Prince",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "75342-",
        "sire": "Iffraaj",
        "dam_sire": "Refuse To Bend",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "47.1",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.70",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-12.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-16 last year but runner-up four times, including over C&D last October when last seen; he's run well on his reappearance in each of the last two seasons and this three-time C&D winner could be bang there."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Dr Rio",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Declan Carroll",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "16615-",
        "sire": "Rio De La Plata",
        "dam_sire": "Monsieur Bond",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "45.9",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.37",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All six of his wins in Britain, and all ten of his outings last season, have come at Beverley; won over 7.4f/1m4f last summer but this 10yo lacks a recent outing and hasn't really shone on his three previous visits here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Hostility",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "22444-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "45.1",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.49",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "13-race maiden who wasn't at his best towards the end of last year; however, he's dropped to a dangerous mark and it will be no surprise if he's in the shake-up on this reappearance, for which he wears a first-time visor."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Highfield Sunshine",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "John & Sean Quinn",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "53657-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "44.1",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.14",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Below best at the end of last season and she's 0-12; wears a first-time hood for this return, having worn blinkers then cheekpieces on final two runs last term; on a handy mark on last season's best efforts (including over C&D) and she's not discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Coconut Bay",
        "jockey": "Oisin McSweeney",
        "trainer": "Tristan Davidson",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "26777-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "43.4",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.37",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "She lost her form last autumn but won four times during a busy 2025, two of them over C&D (good/good to firm), and a break may have helped; she's 3lb below her last winning mark and could have a big say."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Roundhay Park",
        "jockey": "Faye McManoman",
        "trainer": "Nigel Tinkler",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "14285-",
        "sire": "Mayson",
        "dam_sire": "Daylami",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "42.3",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.32",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Course winner who scored at Ripon (6f, soft) last July and is just 2lb higher on this reappearance outing; however, 6f has been this 11yo's optimum trip in recent seasons, and this is his first run since October."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Tarlac",
        "jockey": "Greg Fairley",
        "trainer": "Katie Scott",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "9476-7",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "32.9",
        "model_pct": "2.0%",
        "fair_odds": "50.32",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He's 6lb lower than when winning at Ripon (6f, good to soft) last May and he may have needed his recent comeback run at Newcastle; however, he was also below his best on his final few starts last term and 6f may suit best."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising start to his handicap career when third of five at Wolverhampton last month (9.4f, AW); he will need more to come out on top but he is low mileage and the addition of a visor can give him a lift."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-5 for Jane Chapple-Hyam; low-key stable debut in February but he took a good step forward fitted with a hood and upped to 1m2f when third at Doncaster ten days ago; travelled strongly there and he remains open to further progress; good chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Al's River",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "James Horton",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "72",

        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fair form in three quick runs last autumn, finishing third of 14 at Chelmsford on the most recent of them (1m); stamina in bottom half of his pedigree but this opening mark will demand improvement; gelded since last run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Port Darwin",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "67",

        "weight": "9-2",

        "fair_odds": "9.57",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a successful nursery debut at Musselburgh (1m, good) last August; not kicked on from that in four runs since, including when upped to 1m2f at Chelmsford last month; now has cheekpieces fitted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked a work in progress in three 2yo runs, showing his best form on the second occasion (1m, good to soft); looks sure to improve for 1m2f on paper and he returns with his stable going well."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise in three novice runs (7f-1m; best run on soft ground) as a 2yo; bred to appreciate the extra distance but she needs to prove this opening mark is in range."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-12.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The form of his latest seventh of eight at Southwell (7f) has taken some knocks and he was never the slightest threat in a steadily run affair; did plug on though and he could prove a different proposition now up in trip for his handicap debut; Dan Skelton still seeking a first Flat winner but that is unlikely to remain the case for long and Rossa Ryan has been booked; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Down the field in three 2yo runs; fitted with a hood for his handicap/seasonal debut at Wolverhampton nine days ago, a race where he was sent off a warm favourite but pulled his chance away early; tongue-tie now added; will need to settle better now upped in class."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The second of her three 2yo runs was respectable (1m1f, good to soft) and she should have no problem with this trip and further; market to guide back from six months off."
      }

        "edge": "-10.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well held in two strong turf maidens last term; Cork race in which she was 13l seventh of 11 was won by subsequent dual Group 1 winner Precise; should be better for a run in a 6f maiden at Dundalk and this trip should be more suitable; interesting in this grade with Julian Pietropaolo claiming 7lb."

        "spotlight": "Won at Newcastle (1m4f, AW) in February when dropped back in trip on his second handicap start; not devoid of promise in France last May on sole run on turf; now things have clicked, this lightly raced and well-bred 4yo is in excellent hands to continue to progress; very much respected up 4lb."

        "spotlight": "Hold-up filly who went close at Wolverhampton (8.6f) on her penultimate run but she didn't fire there last time; still lightly raced on turf but she's not easy to predict and needs to bounce back again after that last run; switch of headgear."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Spirit Catcher",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "/008-0",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Soviet Star",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "36.7",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.74",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Triple turf winner (7f/1m) but his last success was in August 2023 and he's been out of sorts since returning from a lengthy absence in September; mark is tumbling but he needs a major revival back on turf."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Gowran Park",
    "time": "16:25",
    "race_name": "Irish Stallion Farms EBF Fillies Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Soft",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Never Loose",
        "jockey": "Seamie Heffernan",
        "trainer": "J A Stack",
        "ts": "20",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Maria's Mon",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-5",
        "score": "61.5",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.56",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Comfortably won a Galway maiden in heavy on debut last autumn over 7f; the form of that race is solid; yard is amongst the winners and ground will be fine; can be a player on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Angelight",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "/4321-",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "60.1",
        "model_pct": "11.9%",
        "fair_odds": "8.39",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third runner for yard; got off the mark when winning a Dundalk maiden over 1m last November; had previously run well on turf and at this track; wide draw but one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Electric Beauty",
        "jockey": "Wesley Joyce(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Mulvany",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "-80012",
        "sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "dam_sire": "Bertolini",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.12",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-14.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won her third race when taking a 1m Curragh handicap in March and was a close second there since; a 5lb rise demands more but has to be taken seriously."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Independent Expert",
        "jockey": "Reese Holohan(7)",
        "trainer": "Denis Gerard Hogan",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "388-16",
        "sire": "Gutaifan",
        "dam_sire": "Refuse To Bend",
        "stall": 17,
        "weight": "10-5",
        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.95",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reserve; won her eighth race when winning on return over this trip at Naas; a solid run off this mark over 1m at the Curragh five days ago; a player if getting a run with 7lb claimed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Greydreambeliever",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "04533-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Authorized",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "16.95",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over 6f on debut for Karl Burke as a 2yo but didn't win since, albeit ran well several times up to 7f and on soft; bought by currentg connections for 30,000gns at the sales last autumn; possibly the yard's selected runner so watch the market."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Sindria",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "/8104-",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.33",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One of two for the yard; won a soft-ground Leopardstown maiden over this trip for Dermot Weld last June; joined this yard after; not a bad run at Roscommon when last seen and can be involved if ready on return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Great Mover",
        "jockey": "Megan Telford-Kelly(7)",
        "trainer": "W McCreery",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "84",

        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "49.2",

        "fair_odds": "18.45",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over the extended 1m1f at this track last September and two decent efforts in defeat after over 1m; was out of the handicap when well beaten in the Irish Lincoln; this is more suitable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Spanish Temptress",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "Richard John O'Brien",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "80",

        "dam_sire": "Amadeus Wolf",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "10-0",

        "fair_odds": "18.92",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won consecutive handicaps last October at Killarney (8f) and Roscommon (7.5f); struggled the last twice having shot up the handicap and ideally needs to drop back down a bit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Think About It",

      },

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "-15.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three classified events at up to 9.4f in the space of four days in January when trained by Daragh Bourke; better effort in handicaps for new yard when second off 11 at Wolverhampton (8.6f) 19 days ago; good shout on that form buts need to prove that he's as effective on turf (0-9) and that he has the stamina for this much longer trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-9.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In good form last autumn, including 1m4f wins Hamilton (soft) and Southwell (AW); the fact he bled when well beaten on his reappearance back at Southwell is a concern but he's a major player on his 2025 form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "fair_odds": "6.08",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Out of sorts when last seen in the autumn but is well treated if a subsequent breathing operation has worked, having won off 8lb higher on turf in summer 2024; worth a betting check with Phil Kirby among the winners."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Roland Garros",

        "trainer": "Hayley Burton",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "7259-5",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Cadeaux Genereux",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "43.5",
        "model_pct": "10.5%",
        "fair_odds": "9.56",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden who returned from wind surgery to finish a respectable fifth on AW Flat and backed that up when 15l second in a 2m maiden hurdle at Southwell (soft) last month; a lesser effort in a handicap hurdle at Wetherby three weeks ago needs forgiving but he dips into a Class 6 for the first time now back on the Flat and has the ability to make his mark at this level; cheekpieces rejoin the tongue-tie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Naturalia",

        "fair_odds": "13.36",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1m5f winner at Ayr (good) off this mark last summer; ended 2025 out of sorts on AW but feasibly handicapped if returning to form back on turf after five months off."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-18 but the fact he arrives on the back of creditable in-frame efforts over 1m4f at Newcastle and Wolverhampton in recent months makes him of some interest in race where most have something to prove."

        "spotlight": "Has done well in AW handicaps this year including two wins, four seconds and a third at Chelmsford (1m2f) two weeks ago; now makes her turf debut but she still has scope for further progress and yard won a division of this race with a similar type last year; in the mix."

        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a promising start when third at Lingfield (7f, good) last August; well held on AW in two subsequent runs for David Menuisier but she has plenty of stamina on dam's side and is a possible improver now upped up in trip on handicap/stable debut; needs watching in market with Rossa Ryan booked on her seasonal return."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close second in a Lingfield maiden (1m, AW) in December and things didn't go her way from wide draw at Wolverhampton later that month; Hollie Doyle is now booked on handicap debut and she could resume her progress back from a break; needs a close look in market."

        "spotlight": "140,000gns yearling; made the breakthrough at the sixth attempt when surging 4l clear in a Newcastle handicap (1m, AW; 6-4 favourite) in November; 8lb higher on his return but he could have a lot more to offer as a 3yo and he's strongly respected back on turf."

      {

        "spotlight": "Sister to four winners including Yibir (7f-2m including 2yo/US Grade 1; RPR 123) and Wild Illusion (1m/1m2f including 2yo/Group 1; 116); sent off 10-11 when getting the better of a subsequent winner on her Newmarket debut (1m, good) last September; bred to stay well and a major player on her return."

      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Fashion's Fancy",
        "jockey": "Toby Moore(7)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",

        "rpr": "-",

        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dam Listed-placed 7f/1m winner (RPR 102), half-sister to winners Rebel's Romance (multiple 1m4f Group/Grade 1 including Breeders' Cup Turf) and Measured Time (UAE 1m1f Group 1/US 9.5f Grade 1), out of Listed-placed 7f 2yo winner; looks the part on breeding and yard has a great strike-rate with 3yo newcomers, but Romantic Symphony does looks the stable first string."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Light Of Paris",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "form": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Big Shuffle",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-10",

        "fair_odds": "6.70",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "500,000gns yearling; half-sister to seven winners including Lucky Lion (German 1m-1m2f including Group 1; RPR 117), Lips Freedom (1m1f-1m4f Flat including Listed; 108; 2m2f hurdle) and Lips Vega (German 1m; 102); dam German 6f-7f winner (inc 2yo/Listed; 102); appealing pedigree and stable can get one ready first time; market confidence would be significant."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Australia",
        "dam_sire": "Aptitude",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-10",

        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "115,000gns yearling; sister to 1m 2yo/1m2f winner Herring Island (RPR 102), closely related to Group-placed 7f 2yo winner War Rooms (106), half-sister to two winners including Aduna (1m2f); dam twice-raced (61) half-sister to Dewhurst winner Distant Music; nice pedigree and stable can get them ready first time; market useful."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Crimson Dawn",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "Daniel Steele",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "30",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "88",
        "sire": "Flag Of Honour",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "35.1",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.96",
        "best_dec": "251.00",
        "edge": "+7.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten a long way into last of eight in two runs on Polytrack (1m/7f) ten weeks apart; has undergone wind surgery since; no appeal."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Catterick",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 in top form, following a 5f Pontefract win with a C&D success eight days later (both on soft ground); has gone well fresh in the past; not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Secret Guest",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Bryan Smart",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "97",

        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",

        "fair_odds": "6.58",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mixed bag this winter but he returns to turf on a handy mark; this trip probably his best and a revival could be forthcoming."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Trilby",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "3324-8",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Helmet",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "14.5%",
        "fair_odds": "6.92",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-14.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive in 2024, including a C&D win, and he made a bright start to 2025 too; a wind op last June helped turn things around in the autumn; blew the start at Newcastle on last month's reappearance; capable of a big run, for all he would be more appealing on a slower surface."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Aberama Gold",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "033395",
        "sire": "Heeraat",
        "dam_sire": "Band On The Run",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.23",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-14.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times in 2025, each of them off today's mark or higher; conceding age to his rivals but it would be no surprise to see him give a good account."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Miraculous",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "30279-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "47.2",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "12.92",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His two highest RPRs for Roger Varian came around a left-hand bend at Chester, winning off 1lb lower last July; ended 2025 with two lesser efforts, after which he was sold for 28,000gns; well drawn for his stable debut; market instructive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Sir Garfield",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "John & Sean Quinn",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "19607-",
        "sire": "James Garfield",
        "dam_sire": "Green Desert",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.77",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins last year included one at Catterick (7f) and one off this mark (6f, good); absent five months and he will need to be at his best to make a winning return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Valley Ofthe Kings",
        "jockey": "Jack Dace(5)",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "29-287",
        "sire": "Gimmethegreenlight",
        "dam_sire": "Captain Al",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.98",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two AW wins last year; didn't run badly in a stronger handicap at Doncaster ten days ago (not well drawn as things panned out); each-way shout going back around a left-hand bend."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Kats Bob",
        "jockey": "William Pyle(3)",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "53345-",
        "sire": "Bobby's Kitten",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "45.8",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "14.86",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner who won five of his first eight starts for Ruth Carr in the first half of 2025; ran well in defeat in the second half of the year too, placed in the Ayr Bronze Cup off 1lb higher; six-month absence to overcome but he shouldn't be underestimated."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Francisco's Piece",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart 2yo; struggled in good handicaps last year but he has slipped down the weights and begins this campaign in a lower grade; one to keep a close eye on this year but drying ground isn't in his favour (best on soft/heavy)."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Nottingham",

    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Cavolo Nero",

        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Turf (1m, good) and AW winner (7f) in 2025; ended last season with a placed effort at Lingfield and he reappeared with a good second at Kempton (1m, Polytrack) last month; looks interesting off unchanged mark and he has shaped as though this new trip should be within range."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Love Beach",
        "jockey": "Ross Coakley",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "83",

        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "58.8",
        "model_pct": "16.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.19",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a maiden at Haydock (1m, good) last May but he's not really gone on from that in handicaps since; ended last season with two respectable thirds at this track (8.3f/1m2f) but he needs to find something extra after 161 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Secret Beach",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Donald McCain",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "10421-",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "12.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.19",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Struggled on hurdling/stable at Newbury in December but his last Flat run resulted in a brave win at Newmarket (1m4f, good) in the autumn; still looks feasibly treated on that form and he's in the mix back from another break; had a second wind operation since his last run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Just An Hour",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Rod Millman",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "44424-",
        "sire": "Justify",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "54.9",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.66",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Generally consistent gelding who won three times last season including on his reappearance over C&D (good; 3-1) last April; still looks on a workable mark and it wouldn't be a surprise if he made a bold bid after 166 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Monty Beau",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "31-335",
        "sire": "Siyouni",
        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.52",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced 5yo who won on handicap debut at Wolverhampton in December (8.6f) and has run to a similar level in three subsequent runs; needs to find more but he's unexposed at this trip and was beaten less than 1l when fifth at Newcastle (1m2f) last time; not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Moon Beginnings",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "David Loughnane",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "128-8",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Maria's Mon",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "7.9%",
        "fair_odds": "12.60",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Started his career with a win at Chester (7f, good) and a second at Southwell (1m, AW) last autumn; looked a useful prospect in those two runs but he's finished a well-held eighth in his two handicaps since; still unexposed but he needs improvement at this new trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Jez Bomb",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "123-36",
        "sire": "Hunter's Light",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.55",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had four wins in 2024 and another four last April-October; none of those were above Class 5 but he's been placed in some Class 4 events since November and things didn't go his way at Wolverhampton last time; should get a better tow into this race and he's in the mix back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Mighty Quiet",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "95",

        "form": "85182-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Marju",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.13",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has patchy profile but she scored at Windsor (1m2f, good) last September and ended last season with a good second in the mud at Bath; returns after 160 days off but her first win was after a break and she's only 3lb higher than for her last success; one to keep an eye on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Qitaal",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "80",

        "stall": 10,

        "fair_odds": "19.65",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Triple turf winner including at this track; returned after six months off with a close call at Lingfield (1m2f) in February but he's been well held in both subsequent runs; now back on last winning mark but losing run is mounting up and he needs cheekpieces to give him a lift."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1m2f French winner; well handicapped on his best form for Kevin Philippart De Foy but he's struggled in last four starts including two runs for new yard this year; overall record is now 1-14 and he has something to prove."
      }
    ]
  },

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "fair_odds": "5.14",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fine dual-purpose sort has 10 wins under all codes including a Bellewstown Flat handicap last August beating a below par Light Up The Dark; won the American Grand National when last seen; handles all ground; a big player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Coeur Sublime",

        "ts": "-",

        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.55",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful hurdler/chaser won on the Flat at Listowel in 2023 and second at the Curragh next time; disappointing over hurdles when last seen; huge absence to defy."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Light Up The Dark",

        "fair_odds": "7.94",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-10.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two bumper wins and added a 1m5f Down Royal Flat maiden to her haul last year; below form at Bellewstown when last seen but is a big player if ready on return; the market could guide."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Nancee Spain",

        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Roscommon handicap by 15l last October but was poor on return off a 14lb higher mark at the Curragh; down 1lb but questions now."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a 1m4f Cork handicap on return last year and some good runs off higher marks after; won over hurdles in November but disqualified for a positive sample; could run well."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his fifth race on the Flat when scoring over 1m4f at Leopardstown last year; some fine runs in defeat after up to 2m; below form last two runs but a chance if at best on return."
      },

  {
    "course": "Kempton (AW)",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "best_dec": "2.00",
        "edge": "-28.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reached the frame in his first two starts in the autumn before a near-miss over 7f here (100-30) in November; his form has been consistent rather than progressive so far but he sets a fair standard and is respected back up in trip on his return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Turret",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.93",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-10.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "580,000euros yearling; second foal of an unraced sister to Group 1 winners Hydrangea (1m/1m4f), The United States (Australian 1m2f) and Hermosa (1,000 Guineas/Irish 1,000 Guineas); another striking newcomer and the market should be informative."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Romanticizing",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "stall": 10,

        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.75",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "180,000gns yearling; tenth foal; closely related to 7f/1m winner Firmament (including AW; RPR 115), half-brother to five winners including Seven Heavens (5f-7f including HK; 107) and You're Hired (7f-11.4f including AW; 103); dam 7f-1m1f winner (including Group 3; 115); drawn out wide on debut but he's bred to be smart and needs a close look."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Electric Dreams",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "49.0",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.28",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-6.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "475,000gns yearling; brother to Group-placed 1m/1m2f AW winner Go Go Boots (RPR 103), half-brother to Group-placed 7f-1m5f winner Travolta (including AW/Australia; 108); dam 9.4f AW 2yo/11.6f turf Listed winner (104); lots to like on paper and interesting to see how he figures in market."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+6.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fifth foal; dam placed 6f AW (RPR 62), half-sister to useful winners Mister Snowdon (6f/7f) and Upward Spiral (5f GB 2yo/US 1m); yard 0-25 in maidens in recent years and she's best watched on bleated debut."
      },

        "ts": "-",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Eighth foal; half-brother to winners Ocean Vision (5f-1m including AW/Listed; RPR 105), Sootability (7f-10.4f; 80) and Khawaater (6f AW 2yo; 69); dam Listed-placed 7f winner (100); makes belated debut as a 5yo and he's probably best watched from wide draw."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "17,000gns foal, 20,000gns yearling, 7,000gns 2yo; fourth foal; closely related to winners Bowerchalke (1m-1m3f AW; RPR 93) and Alvediston (German/Belgian 7f-9.5f including AW); dam Listed-placed 7f 2yo/1m2f winner (92); this looks a tough starting point and yard is 0-9 in maidens in recent years."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "36,000euros yearling, resold 50,000gns later in 2024; outsider on his C&D debut two weeks ago but he made some late headway and was only beaten around 4l; that was an encouraging start and he should know more this time; could be in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Bumaan",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "29",
        "rpr": "50",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "56",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "39.1",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.42",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well held in two novice events (7f) last month, with RPRs in the 40s on both occasions; remains best watched for now."
      }
    ]
  },

  {

        "edge": "-29.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "200,000gns yearling, 750,000gns breeze-up 2yo; sent off 7-4 when beaten a length into second of ten on his Newcastle debut (1m, Tapeta) in February, with 5l back to the third; holds some lofty entries including four at Group 1 level; high on list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Zatsgood",

        "fair_odds": "6.12",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in two starts on the AW over 16 months apart, the latest when beaten 5l on stable debut at Newcastle (7f, Tapeta; 4-9) 18 days ago; extra furlong should help but will need to progress again to get the better of the 3yos."
      },

        "rank": 3,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "11-2 when fifth of ten on his Newcastle debut (1m, Tapeta) in November; open to improvement and the stable won a division of this race last year."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off 40-1 for his Southwell debut (7f, Tapeta) in November, but showed promise in finishing fifth of 14 behind a nice prospect; the form of that race has worked out well; gelded since; worth monitoring in the market."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off 80-1 for his debut over 7f here three weeks ago, but showed ability in finishing fourth of the eight runners; the extra furlong should suit and he makes the shortlist."

        "spotlight": "Failed to beat a rival in her first three starts and was beaten miles each time; cheekpieces given a go; no appeal."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Kempton (AW)",
    "time": "18:30",
    "race_name": "Virgin Bet Daily Price Boosts Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Standard To Slow",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Atmosphere",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Richard Spencer",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "813-32",
        "sire": "Advertise",
        "dam_sire": "Heeraat",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "62.8",
        "model_pct": "30.8%",
        "fair_odds": "3.25",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All seven starts on the AW have been here, with his record in handicaps reading 11332; drawn a bit wider than ideal and another furlong may suit ideally, but still high on the list in this field."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Tattie Bogle",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "373-42",
        "sire": "Outstrip",
        "dam_sire": "Fantastic Light",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.76",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Handy sort who is just 1-17, but he only failed by a nose to double his tally over C&D nine days ago; another big run seems likely from the same mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Dancing Terror",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Amanda Perrett",
        "ts": "25",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "1/2-0",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Proclamation",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.0",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.90",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First and second in two 7f novices at Lingfield the winter before last, but having been off for a year he failed to beat a rival on handicap debut there (1m; 40-1) in February; has something to prove."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "State Of Madness",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Mark Loughnane",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "14-325",
        "sire": "Washington DC",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "50.5",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.48",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-9.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did well in seven starts for Charlie Clover after returning from six months off in October (1121432), but held on his debut for this yard here (6f) a week ago; has never attempted this far before."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ash Wednesday",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "Heather Main",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "40-852",
        "sire": "Outstrip",
        "dam_sire": "Nayef",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.0",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.27",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last 11 AW starts have been on Tapeta (231115111852), but he was beaten less than a length into third of 14 on his last visit here (1m); back up 1lb for his latest second of 12 at Southwell (7f)), but still 1lb below his last winning mark; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "The Bitter Moose",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Patrick Chamings",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "42210-",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Declaration Of War",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "49.0",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.74",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned to winning form in emphatic fashion at Epsom (7f, good) last August, but following an 8lb rise he failed to beat a rival in an amateurs' event at Ascot (7f, good to soft) in October; opposable on first start since."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Margorie",
        "jockey": "Oliver Carmichael(7)",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "6510-",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Intense Focus",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.31",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced; won a Windsor novice (6f, soft; 40-1) last September, but finished around 9l behind Atmosphere on her handicap debut here (1m) the following month; down the list on her first start since."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Arantes Nascimento",
        "jockey": "Kieren Fox",
        "trainer": "Michael Attwater",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "2-2227",
        "sire": "Charm Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Excelebration",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.88",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often placed but has never passed the post first in any of his 23 starts, his sole success courtesy of the stewards; return to this trip should suit, but others preferred for win purposes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Jersey Maverick",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Charlie Fellowes",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "19542-",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Consolidator",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.40",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has run very well in his last two starts over C&D, only going down by a neck in October; not seen since, though, and may just need the run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "King Of Ithaca",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "31-645",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "45.0",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.94",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best known for his Southwell exploits, but has run well here including a win over this trip; the outside stall is not ideal, though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Nubough",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Mark Pattinson",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "750-26",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "43.7",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.46",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Capable on his day and 1lb below his last winning mark, but now at the veteran stage and recent form has an uneven look to it; others more compelling."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Miss Chester",
        "jockey": "Rose Dawes(5)",
        "trainer": "Mark Usher",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "800-08",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "41.5",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "33.71",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed a maiden over C&D in May last year but her form has rather gone west since, albeit she wasn't beaten far into eighth of 12 here (1m) six weeks ago; others stronger nonetheless."
      }
    ]
  },
