  {
    "course": "Kempton (AW)",
    "time": "19:00",
    "race_name": "Virgin Bet Daily Extra Places Fillies' Handicap (London Middle Distance Qualifier) (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m3f",
    "going": "Standard To Slow",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Club Class",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "32312-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "67.7",
        "model_pct": "27.8%",
        "fair_odds": "3.60",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent last year (3232312); easily landed a 1m4f novice in a first-time tongue-tie here in September and put up an even better effort when second of 13 in a handicap over the same trip the following month; has fitness to prove after 161 days off, but still a major player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Rastnet",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "221-22",
        "sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "dam_sire": "Dubai Destination",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "65.3",
        "model_pct": "22.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.38",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-9.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent filly who probably ran into one when second of seven at Newcastle (1m4f, Tapeta) 18 days ago; much respected now just up against her own sex."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Caramay",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "William Muir & Chris Grassick",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "3-3413",
        "sire": "Lethal Force",
        "dam_sire": "Mount Nelson",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.7",
        "model_pct": "14.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.96",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tough mare who has been in good form since December including a win over C&D in February; almost certain to run her race, but she looks on a stiff mark now and may need to give best to younger fillies."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Dojin",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "S Woods",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "3/13-",
        "sire": "Iffraaj",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "57.1",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.65",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed ability in all three starts on the AW including winning a Southwell novice (1m3f, Tapeta) in March last year, but was behind Spirit Of Jura on handicap debut there the following month; not seen since."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Spirit Of Jura",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3206-4",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Duke Of Marmalade",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "55.4",
        "model_pct": "10.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.94",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won four times over 1m-1m5f last year, three of them on the AW; may be better for last month's Southwell return, but she looks weighted up to her best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Schemaya",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "33552-",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.02",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a successful handicap debut at Windsor (11.4f, good to firm) in May last year and ran her best race since when second of six at Wolverhampton (1m6f, Tapeta) in October; not quite sure how she will cope with the drop in trip after six months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Big Bear Hug",
        "jockey": "Pat Cosgrave",
        "trainer": "Jim Boyle",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "98608-",
        "sire": "Belardo",
        "dam_sire": "Indian Ridge",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "42.5",
        "model_pct": "3.4%",
        "fair_odds": "29.08",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a successful stable debut after seven months off at Goodwood (1m4f, good to soft) in June last year, but is now 7lb lower for a reason; others stronger."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Kempton (AW)",
    "time": "19:30",
    "race_name": "Every Saturday Money Back Handicap (London Sprint Series Qualifier)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard To Slow",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Arry Up",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Rod Millman",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "7931-1",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "64.6",
        "model_pct": "24.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.11",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Got to the front from his wide stall and was a convincing C&D winner on seasonal debut a week ago; carries 6lb penalty in higher-grade race today but is better drawn this time and could be hard to catch."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Return Of The Gods",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "31-",
        "sire": "Tasleet",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "64.2",
        "model_pct": "23.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.25",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Closely related to smart AW performer Cool Hand Luke; built upon promising debut when leading close home at Wolverhampton (6f) in October; makes handicap debut after 170-day absence but should have more improvement to come; tongue-tie added."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Hallo Spaceboy",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "321-",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.6",
        "model_pct": "13.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.18",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-10.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed twice over 6f on turf before winning 5f AW novice at skinny odds at Newcastle in November; back up in trip for this seasonal/handicap debut and features prominently in calculations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Night Mission",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "Mark Rimell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "232-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "10.5%",
        "fair_odds": "9.54",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the frame in all three 2yo races, finding one too good when 2-7 favourite for run-of-the-mill Redcar novice (6f, good) on most recent occasion; gelded during subsequent break; probably needs improvement on this handicap/AW debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Unionville",
        "jockey": "Kieren Fox",
        "trainer": "Michael Attwater",
        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "044-21",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "54.8",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.23",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-Irish gelding who went close on stable/handicap debut over C&D in January and dead-heated in tactical Chelmsford maiden (6f) the following month; probably needs to find extra today but still considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Cryingintherain",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "851-",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.66",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came good at the third attempt, keeping on well in 6f Lingfield novice in December; not seen since and not ideally drawn for handicap debut but opening mark ought to be workable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Perfect Location",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Tom Ward",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "5102-",
        "sire": "Cable Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Excelebration",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.01",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 6f AW maiden under Sean Levey at Southwell last summer and came second on nursery debut at Leicester (6f, good to soft) on latest outing in September; nicely drawn for a prominent racer here; contender if fully tuned up after 198-day break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Goldwork",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "81400-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "42.7",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "31.44",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained his 2yo win at Goodwood (6f, good) last spring; struggled to cope with heavy ground on last summer's nursery debut and predictably found valuable sales race too hot when last in action but this contest looks more suitable on his seasonal return."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Kempton (AW)",
    "time": "20:00",
    "race_name": "Virgin Bet Handicap (London Sprint Series Qualifier)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard To Slow",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Hint Of The Jungle",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Mike Murphy",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "2-5211",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Fast Company",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "64.9",
        "model_pct": "19.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.19",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Appears to have appreciated the return to 7f with wins at Southwell (Tapeta) and Chelmsford (Polytrack) on his last two starts; up another 3lb, but bigger questions may be the return to 6f and his high draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Initial Blue",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Dr Richard Newland & Jamie Insole",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "351333",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "59.8",
        "model_pct": "13.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.27",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent gelding who is 7lb higher than when making all over C&D in February, but has been placed in all three starts off this sort of mark in the meantime; the outside stall is the main concern."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Watermelon Sugar",
        "jockey": "Joey Haynes",
        "trainer": "Chelsea Banham",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "051-21",
        "sire": "Gutaifan",
        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "58.8",
        "model_pct": "12.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.76",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In good form at Lingfield lately and has become a bit of a specialist over 6f there (112121); it's a different story here (8770) and that would be the concern."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Twilight Madness",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "Simon Hodgson",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "293231",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Rahy",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "58.5",
        "model_pct": "12.6%",
        "fair_odds": "7.96",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often a front-runner and dual C&D winner who has been in good form lately, including scoring by a neck at Bath (5f, good) on Sunday; has a 4lb penalty for that, but is well drawn to attack and much respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Big Bard",
        "jockey": "Jude Fernandes(7)",
        "trainer": "Gary & Josh Moore",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "067-19",
        "sire": "Poet's Voice",
        "dam_sire": "Pastoral Pursuits",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.10",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistency not his strong suit, but he is 2-5 over C&D and latest heavy defeat excusable on account of his wide draw; capable if on a going day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Teardrops",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Richard Spencer",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "123023",
        "sire": "Tasleet",
        "dam_sire": "Royal Applause",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "48.3",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.63",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last 11 AW starts have come at Newcastle including three wins over this trip; well beaten in both visits here, though they were at the start of his career; Oisin Murphy is 6-29 (21%) for the stable in the last five years."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Just Jump",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "73-375",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Royal Academy",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.63",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1-20, the win coming in a Bellewstown maiden claimer (1m, soft) in October; has shown encouragement since joining Tony Carroll and can't be easily dismissed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Vitalline",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Keiran Burke",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "755150",
        "sire": "Due Diligence",
        "dam_sire": "Touch Gold",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.54",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frequent slow-starter who is a four-time winner here, the latest in a 0-50 classified event over 7f last month; twice held since, though, and doesn't have a great draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Travel Agent",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Lingfield (6f, Polytrack) for Martin Dunne last summer and made an encouraging stable debut after six months off when fourth of nine at Southwell (6f, Tapeta) 13 days ago; could go well if building on that with an eyeshield given a go."
